untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern identification requires candlestick pattern recognition (high-low-high-low-high sequence) which is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal depends on visual pattern detection rather than quantitative indicators. Additionally, market regime classification (BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET) is not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot point as a breakout proxy, but this does not capture the true diamond pattern mechanics. Author provides limited quantitative exit rules (marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Hold days set to 70 based on source text reference. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal specification. Manual pattern detection required before applying this rule.
